name: Insektstop Universal Spray
description: All-purpose indoor insect spray effective against ants, flies, cockroaches, and more. Fast-acting formula with up to 4 weeks protection.

name: Insektstop Ant Bait Gel
description: Highly attractive gel bait that eliminates entire ant colonies. Easy to apply in corners and crevices. Safe for indoor use.

name: Insektstop Mosquito Repellent
description: Long-lasting mosquito repellent lotion with natural active ingredients. Provides up to 8 hours of protection against mosquitoes and midges.

name: Insektstop Fly Trap
description: Non-toxic sticky fly trap for indoor and outdoor use. Odorless and discreet design. Each pack contains 4 traps.

name: Insektstop Cockroach Killer
description: Powerful cockroach bait station with a child-resistant design. Kills cockroaches and prevents re-infestation for up to 3 months.

name: Insektstop Spider Repellent Spray
description: Natural peppermint-based spray that deters spiders and other crawling insects. Safe for use around children and pets.
